title: T-007 — Migration: d365_sync_jobs and d365_sync_dlq
prompt: Create Drizzle migration per §5.7 D365 sync state. `d365_sync_jobs`(id PK, org_id, direction TEXT CHECK in ('pull','push'), target_entity TEXT CHECK in ('items','bom','formula','wo_confirmation','journal'), status TEXT default 'scheduled' CHECK in ('scheduled','running','completed','failed','dlq'), records_processed INT default 0, records_failed INT default 0, started_at, completed_at, error_summary, trigger_source TEXT CHECK in ('cron','manual','event'), idempotency_key TEXT UNIQUE, created_at). `d365_sync_dlq`(id PK, sync_job_id FK d365_sync_jobs, record_key TEXT NOT NULL, payload JSONB NOT NULL, error_message TEXT NOT NULL, retry_count INT default 0, last_retry_at, resolved_at, resolution, created_at). RLS org_id-scoped. RED command: `pnpm vitest run tests/db/d365.migration.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: D365 sync jobs + DLQ tables, idempotency_key UNIQUE, RLS isolation.
pipeline_inputs.details: DLQ.error_message NOT NULL enforces V-TEC-71. idempotency_key UNIQUE enforces V-TEC-72 (duplicate detection becomes 409 at API layer). 7-year retention is policy not schema — document in ADR.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration applied, when inserting two rows with same idempotency_key, then second insert fails with unique-violation.
Given DLQ row attempted with empty error_message, then NOT NULL rejects.
Given RLS active, when org context absent, then no rows visible across both tables.
test_strategy: RED tests for UNIQUE idempotency + NOT NULL DLQ + RLS.
risk_red_lines: Do not connect to live D365 in tests — schema-only here.
